# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: frontend-vs
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - frontend
    - frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - istio-system/main-gateway
  http:
    - name: "frontend-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
          headers:
            x-api-version:
              exact: "v2"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 80
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,5xx
    - name: "frontend-default-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 80
          weight: 90
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 80
          weight: 10
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
      corsPolicy:
        allowOrigins:
          - exact: "https://example.com"
          - prefix: "https://*.example.com"
        allowMethods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        allowHeaders:
          - authorization
          - content-type
          - x-request-id
          - x-api-version
        exposeHeaders:
          - x-request-id
        maxAge: "24h"
        allowCredentials: true
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: frontend-dr
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
      localityLbSetting:
        enabled: true
        failover:
          - from: us-west
            to: us-east
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
            http2MaxRequests: 500
    - name: v2
      labels:
        version: v2
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
            http2MaxRequests: 250
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: backend-api-vs
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - backend-api
    - backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "backend-api-v2-header-route"
      match:
        - headers:
            x-api-version:
              exact: "v2"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 20s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,retriable-4xx,5xx
    - name: "backend-api-canary-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 80
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 20
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 20s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
      fault:
        delay:
          percentage:
            value: 0
          fixedDelay: 0s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: backend-api-dr
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 200
        http2MaxRequests: 2000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 20
        maxRetries: 5
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
      localityLbSetting:
        enabled: true
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 40
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 200
            http2MaxRequests: 1000
    - name: v2
      labels:
        version: v2
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
            http2MaxRequests: 500
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: order-service-vs
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - order-service
    - order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "order-service-default-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 45s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 15s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: order-service-dr
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 150
        http2MaxRequests: 1500
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 15
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: payment-service-vs
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - payment-service
    - payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "payment-service-default-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8443
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: payment-service-dr
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
        maxRetries: 2
        idleTimeout: 120s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 30
      minHealthPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: notification-service-vs
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - notification-service
    - notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "notification-service-default-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,5xx
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: notification-service-dr
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 500
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 5
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 120s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: user-service-vs
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - user-service
    - user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "user-service-default-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: user-service-dr
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 150
        http2MaxRequests: 1500
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: main-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*.example.com"
      tls:
        httpsRedirect: false
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: https
        protocol: HTTPS
      hosts:
        - "*.example.com"
      tls:
        mode: SIMPLE
        credentialName: example-com-tls-credential
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: mesh-wide-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
